about.title: About me
about.intro: Software Engineer with **{years}+ years of experience** delivering end-to-end web solutions. Specialized in **Python** and **Django** on the backend, with growing expertise in **React** on the frontend. I've led projects from conception to deployment across industries like **fintech**, **insurance**, **government** and **construction** — both as a **sole developer** and as part of **collaborative teams**.
highlights: Data process optimization with up to **50%** reduction in execution time
Restructuring of complex databases improving quality and performance
Large-scale data processing in the cloud (**10M+ records**)
Integration of multiple payment gateways into web platforms
Deployments on **AWS**, **GCP**, **Heroku** and **Render**
about.closing: I bring ownership, speed and results.

highlights: Development of new features for the educational payment platform
Applied payment corrections
Implementation and update of payment gateways: Nequi, Pagatodo and MercadoPago
SFTP integration with MercadoPago for file transfer
Development of REST APIs for internal and external consumption
Streamlined payment ticket resolution

positions.position: Full Stack Web Developer / DevOps Engineer / Tech Lead
highlights: Led an insurance platform as the sole senior developer
Optimized views and refactored code across backend and frontend
Managed a microservices system and server deployments
Updated a legacy chatbot and integrated it into a React project
Integrated a Rasa chatbot with Clientify CRM for lead automation
Developed an interactive map for a museum using TypeScript and React
Web scraping with Selenium and chatbot training with Rasa

positions.position: Full Stack Web Developer / DevOps Engineer
highlights: Database design, endpoint and websocket development
Integrated Stripe payment gateway with real-time monitoring using Chart.js
Code refactoring and deployment management on Heroku as sole responsible

positions.position: Backend Web Developer / Data Scientist Assistant
highlights: Developed the base code for data import, reducing execution time by 50%
Developed a plan for database refactoring approved by the team and superiors, resulting in a 15% reduction of a 140-table database
Implemented OOP on database models
Developed a prototype of a microservice for asynchronous report generation with Celery and Redis
Web scraping of medical insurance quotes using Selenium
Worked in an AI team as analyst, ML apprentice and intermediary with development and devops areas
Analyzed bank data sources on GCP using pandas, MongoDB and Jupyter notebooks
Found a way to process 10 million records in the cloud using pandas and MongoDB
Team leader for a data science project
Python trainer for the team
Developed a prediction model for Kickstarter campaign success using DataIKU

positions.position: Full Stack Web Developer / DevOps Engineer
highlights: Sole developer of the entire project, from conception and requirements gathering to deployment and maintenance on AWS EC2

User training and technical support
